name: report_life_event
description: Initiates the process for a qualifying life event (QLE) like marriage, birth, or divorce, allowing for changes to benefits and personal information.

requiredFields.name: event_type
requiredFields.label: Life Event Type
options: Death of a dependent or spouse
requiredFields.description: Select the type of qualifying life event you are reporting.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Event
requiredFields.description: The date the event occurred (e.g., date of marriage, date of birth).

confirmationMessage: You are about to report a '[event_type]' event that occurred on [event_date]. This will open a 31-day special enrollment period to make eligible benefit changes. Do you want to proceed?
successMessage: Your life event has been successfully recorded. Please proceed with any necessary actions, such as adding or removing dependents, before your special enrollment period ends.

name: add_dependent
description: Adds a new dependent (spouse, domestic partner, or child) to your HR record, making them eligible for benefit enrollment.

requiredFields.name: first_name
requiredFields.label: First Name
requiredFields.description: Dependent's legal first name.

requiredFields.name: last_name
requiredFields.label: Last Name
requiredFields.description: Dependent's legal last name.

requiredFields.name: relationship
requiredFields.label: Relationship
requiredFields.description: Your relationship to the dependent.

requiredFields.name: date_of_birth
requiredFields.label: Date of Birth
requiredFields.description: Dependent's date of birth.

requiredFields.name: social_security_number
requiredFields.label: Social Security Number (SSN)
requiredFields.description: Dependent's SSN is required for benefit and tax purposes.

confirmationMessage: You are about to add [first_name] [last_name] as your [relationship]. Please ensure all information is correct before submitting.
successMessage: Successfully added [first_name] [last_name] as a dependent. You can now enroll them in eligible benefits during your special enrollment period.

name: remove_dependent
description: Removes a dependent from your benefits due to a qualifying event like divorce, legal separation, or a child reaching the age limit.

requiredFields.name: dependent_name
requiredFields.label: Dependent to Remove
requiredFields.description: Select the dependent you need to remove from your coverage.

requiredFields.name: reason_for_removal
requiredFields.label: Reason for Removal
requiredFields.description: Select the reason for removing this dependent.

requiredFields.name: removal_effective_date
requiredFields.label: Coverage End Date
requiredFields.description: The date coverage for this dependent should end.

confirmationMessage: This will remove [dependent_name] from all benefit plans effective [removal_effective_date]. This action is generally irreversible. Do you wish to continue?
successMessage: Successfully submitted the request to remove the dependent. COBRA continuation information will be sent to their last known address, if applicable.

name: update_address
description: Updates your home address for payroll, tax withholding, and benefit plan eligibility.

requiredFields.name: street_address
requiredFields.label: Street Address
requiredFields.description: Your new street address, including apartment number if applicable.

requiredFields.name: city
requiredFields.label: City
requiredFields.description: The city of your new address.

requiredFields.name: state
requiredFields.label: State
requiredFields.description: The state of your new address.

requiredFields.name: zip_code
requiredFields.label: ZIP Code
requiredFields.description: The ZIP code of your new address.

confirmationMessage: You are about to change your address to [street_address], [city], [state] [zip_code]. This may impact your tax withholding and available health plans. Proceed?
successMessage: Your address has been successfully updated. Please review your tax and benefit information to see if additional changes are required due to your move.

name: change_tax_withholding
description: Updates your federal and state tax withholding information (Form W-4) following a life event.

requiredFields.name: filing_status
requiredFields.label: Filing Status
requiredFields.description: Select your tax filing status as it will appear on your tax return.

requiredFields.name: number_of_dependents
requiredFields.label: Number of Dependents Claimed
requiredFields.description: Enter the total number of dependents you will claim for tax credits.

requiredFields.name: additional_withholding
requiredFields.label: Additional Amount to Withhold (per pay period)
requiredFields.description: Enter any extra dollar amount you want withheld from each paycheck for taxes.

confirmationMessage: You are updating your W-4 to '[filing_status]' with [number_of_dependents] dependents and an additional withholding of $[additional_withholding]. Do you confirm these changes?
successMessage: Your tax withholding information has been updated. The changes will be applied to your next available pay cycle.

name: update_beneficiaries
description: Updates the primary and contingent beneficiaries for your life insurance and retirement plans.

requiredFields.name: plan_type
requiredFields.label: Plan
requiredFields.description: Select the plan for which you are updating beneficiaries.

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_name
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Full Name
requiredFields.description: Full legal name of the person or entity who will receive the benefit first.

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_relationship
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Relationship
requiredFields.description: Your relationship to the primary beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: primary_allocation_percentage
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Allocation (%)
requiredFields.description: The percentage of the benefit this person will receive. Enter 100 if there is only one.

confirmationMessage: You are designating [primary_beneficiary_name] as the beneficiary for [primary_allocation_percentage]% of your [plan_type] plan. Is this correct?
successMessage: Your beneficiary designation for the [plan_type] has been successfully updated. Remember to update beneficiaries for your other plans if needed.
